description: Extended knowledge retrieval scenarios testing cross-agent memory lookup

scenarios.name: Incident Postmortem Lookup
scenarios.description: Find past incident with similar symptoms to current issue

agents.role: Current on-call engineer facing an issue

preloaded_knowledge.cause: Unclosed file handles in batch job

scenarios.current_issue: API latency has increased to 4.8s, users reporting timeouts
scenarios.task: Find the most relevant past incident and suggest the fix
assertions: Identifies connection pool as likely cause

scenarios.name: Architecture Decision Records
scenarios.description: Retrieve relevant ADR for current architectural decision
scenarios.current_decision: Should we split the monolith now that the team has grown to 25 people?
scenarios.task: Find relevant ADRs and assess if original decision should be revisited

scenarios.name: Customer Preference Recall
scenarios.description: Agent B needs Agent A's notes about customer preferences

preloaded_knowledge.preferences: Prefers email over phone. Technical contact: jane@acme.com. Billing issues: escalate to CFO directly.
Fast-growing startup. Budget-conscious. Likes self-service options.
Strict security requirements. All changes need 2-week notice. Contact via encrypted channel only.
High volume, needs SLA guarantees. Dedicated support preferred. Contact: ops-team@retailgiant.com

scenarios.current_request: BigBank Ltd is asking for an urgent feature change
scenarios.task: Retrieve customer preferences and advise on how to handle the request

scenarios.name: Codebase Conventions Lookup
scenarios.description: New developer needs to find team's coding standards

preloaded_knowledge.content: Use 2-space indentation. Max line length 100. Prefer functional style.
Use conventional commits: feat/fix/chore/docs. Max 72 chars in subject.
1. Tests pass 2. Linter clean 3. Two approvals required 4. Squash merge only
Use Result types, not exceptions. Log errors with context. Never swallow errors.

scenarios.task: New dev is about to submit a PR. What conventions should they follow?

scenarios.name: Meeting Notes Synthesis
scenarios.description: Combine notes from multiple meetings into coherent summary

agents.role: Needs project status from multiple meetings

preloaded_knowledge.notes: Committed to 5 stories. Auth feature highest priority. Risk: external API dependency.
Auth integration 60% done. Blocked on API keys from vendor. Fallback plan discussed.
Demo scheduled for Mar 25. Need auth feature complete. Scope reduced if needed.
API keys received. Auth integration resumed. On track for Mar 24 completion.

scenarios.task: Synthesize the project status from these meetings for an executive summary

scenarios.name: Competitive Analysis

preloaded_knowledge.recent: Raised Series C, expanding to APAC

scenarios.task: We're planning AI features. What's the competitive landscape?

scenarios.name: Onboarding Knowledge

preloaded_knowledge.content: Primary: dbt, Snowflake, Airflow. BI: Metabase. All queries must go through approved views.
Request via IT ticket. Prod read-only by default. Write access needs manager approval.
Rotation every 2 weeks. PagerDuty for alerts. Runbooks in Notion.
GitHub, CircleCI, AWS. Different stack than data team.

scenarios.task: New data team member asks: What tools do I need and how do I get access?
assertions: Does NOT include engineering team info

scenarios.name: Regulatory Compliance
scenarios.description: Find relevant policies for handling customer data request

preloaded_knowledge.policy: Must delete within 30 days. Notify customer. Keep audit log (anonymized).
Provide data export within 30 days. Machine-readable format.
45 days to comply. Can verify identity first. Exceptions for legal holds.
All access logged. 1 year retention. Quarterly audit.

scenarios.task: EU customer requests all their data deleted. What's the process?

scenarios.task: We have 2 weeks for debt reduction. What should we prioritize?
